zh.lifeSummary: Anna Margaretha Batzenschlager是Hans Niclaus Batzenschlager的女兒，於1629年1月25日出生在德國巴登-爾特波格藍德可萊斯 卡爾茲盧斯圖斯塔福特。她於1645年2月21日與Johann Jakob Stober在巴登貝爾可薩赤 卡爾茲盧斯塔福特結婚。他們至少是12個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1691年10月30日在她的家鄉享年62歲，埋葬在德國巴登-爾特波格藍德可萊斯 卡爾茲盧斯圖斯塔福特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Anna Margaretha Batzenschlager是Hans Niclaus Batzenschlager的女儿，于1629年1月25日出生在德国巴登-爾特波格藍德可萊斯 卡爾茲盧斯圖斯塔福特。她于1645年2月21日与Johann Jakob Stober在巴登貝爾可薩赤 卡爾茲盧斯塔福特结婚。他们至少是12个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1691年10月30日在她的家乡享年62岁，埋葬在德国巴登-爾特波格藍德可萊斯 卡爾茲盧斯圖斯塔福特。

nameMeanings.name: Anna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

variants.name: Anne
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

nameMeanings.name: Margaretha
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Margaret
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

en.lifeSummary: Anna Margaretha Batzenschlager was born on 25 January 1629, in Staffort, Stutensee, Karlsruhe, Baden-Württemberg, Germany as the daughter of Hans Niclaus Batzenschlager. She married Johann Jakob Stober on 21 February 1645, in Staffort, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden. They were the parents of at least 12 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 30 October 1691, in her hometown, at the age of 62, and was buried in Staffort, Stutensee, Karlsruhe, Baden-Württemberg, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Anna Margaretha Batzenschlager est née le 25 janvier 1629, à Staffort, Stutensee, Landkreis Karlsruhe, Baden-Württemberg, Allemagne, fille de Hans Niclaus Batzenschlager. Elle a épousé Johann Jakob Stober le 21 février 1645, à Staffort, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden. Ils ont eu au moins 12 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 30 octobre 1691, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterrée à Staffort, Stutensee, Landkreis Karlsruhe, Baden-Württemberg, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Anna Margaretha Batzenschlager wurde am 25. Januar 1629 in Staffort, Stutensee, Landkreis Karlsruhe, Baden-Württemberg, Deutschland, als Tochter von Hans Niclaus Batzenschlager geboren. Sie hat am 21. Februar 1645 in Staffort, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden Johann Jakob Stober geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 12 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 30. Oktober 1691 im Alter von 62 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Staffort, Stutensee, Landkreis Karlsruhe, Baden-Württemberg, Deutschland begraben.

Lei sposato Johann Jakob Stober il 21 febbraio 1645, nel Staffort, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden. Erano genitori di almeno 12 figli e 1 figlia. ja.lifeSummary: Anna Margaretha Batzenschlagerは1629年1月25日にドイツバデン-ウuルッテンバーグランドクレイス カルルスルヘストゥテンセスタフォートでHans Niclaus Batzenschlagerの娘として生まれた。1645年2月21日にバデンベズイルクサムト カルルスルヘスタフォートでJohann Jakob Stoberと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも12人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1691年10月30日に故郷で62歳で死去し，ドイツバデン-ウuルッテンバーグランドクレイス カルルスルヘストゥテンセスタフォートにて埋葬された。

ko.Staffort, Stutensee, Karlsruhe, Baden-Wü: 독일 바데-wu르테버그 랜드크레이스 칼스루헤 스투텐시 스태포트
ko.lifeSummary: Anna Margaretha Batzenschlager(은)는 1629년 1월 25일 독일 바데-wu르테버그 랜드크레이스 칼스루헤 스투텐시 스태포트에서 Hans Niclaus Batzenschlager의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1645년 2월 21일 바든 베지르크샘트 칼스루헤 스태포트에서 Johann Jakob Stober(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1691년 10월 30일 그녀의 고향에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 바데-wu르테버그 랜드크레이스 칼스루헤 스투텐시 스태포트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Anna Margaretha Batzenschlager nasceu em 25 de janeiro de 1629, em Staffort, Stutensee, Landkreis Karlsruhe, Baden-Württemberg, Alemanha filha de Hans Niclaus Batzenschlager. Ela casou-se com Johann Jakob Stober em 21 de fevereiro de 1645, em Staffort, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden. Eles tiveram pelo menos 12 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 30 de outubro de 1691, em sua cidade natal, com 62 anos, e foi sepultada em Staffort, Stutensee, Landkreis Karlsruhe, Baden-Württemberg, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Anna Margaretha Batzenschlager родилась 25 января 1629 г. в местности стаффорт, стутенси, ландкрис карлсрух, баден-вuрттембирг, Германия. Её отца звали Hans Niclaus Batzenschlager. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Johann Jakob Stober 21 февраля 1645 г. в местности стаффорт, безирксэмт карлсрух, баден. У них было по крайней мере 12 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла 30 октября 1691 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 62 лет и была похоронена в местности стаффорт, стутенси, ландкрис карлсрух, баден-вuрттембирг, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Anna Margaretha Batzenschlager nació el 25 de enero de 1629, en Staffort, Stutensee, Landkreis Karlsruhe, Baden-Württemberg, Alemania como hija de Hans Niclaus Batzenschlager. Se casó con Johann Jakob Stober el 21 de febrero de 1645, en Staffort, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden. Fueron padres de por lo menos 12 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 30 de octubre de 1691, en su pueblo, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultada en Staffort, Stutensee, Landkreis Karlsruhe, Baden-Württemberg, Alemania.
